## Checklist

- [ ] I opened an issue first and this PR references it
- [ ] Tests pass: `docker compose up --exit-code-from test-runner test-runner`
- [ ] Lint passes: `ruff check . && ruff format --check .`
- [ ] I have **not** deleted, commented out, or disabled any existing test or workflow
- [ ] I have **not** added personal infrastructure identifiers (DockerHub accounts,
      SonarCloud keys, deployment hosts, secrets)
- [ ] This PR addresses a single concern
